name: Karell School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade County Public Schools approved private bus operator (Hialeah-area)
recent_news: No M&A or public news located; small single-location operator at 1871 W 62nd St, Hialeah; not in current M-DCPS approved private bus list located.
fit_notes: Micro-operator (~16 employees, ~$700K revenue) in dense Miami-Dade private school bus market; too small for standalone tuck-in but could be a route/license bolt-on if Summit builds FL density.

fit_notes: Young (2021) owner-led Orlando operator at ~$670K revenue; well below Summit core tuck-in size threshold and only ~4 years of trading history — more relevant as future watch-list than near-term target.

name: Mom's School Bus
districts_or_customers: Likely Broward County Public Schools / private schools in Pembroke Pines area
recent_news: No M&A or public news located; operates from residential address (11978 SW 12th St, Pembroke Pines), consistent with very small owner-operator school transport.

name: Myers Transportation
principals: Myers family (current generation manages day-to-day); Mark Berkely (Manager, Swissvale/Woodland Hills Terminal)
districts_or_customers: Pittsburgh Public Schools (confirmed carrier; Myers buses include unit L401)
Westmoreland County schools out of Export and Latrobe PA bases
recent_news: No M&A located; family-owned operator with ~75-year history operating from three PA terminals (Export, Latrobe, Pittsburgh/Swissvale-Woodland Hills); active Pittsburgh Public Schools carrier as of recent district info.
fit_notes: The Swissvale address is Myers Transportation Inc.'s Woodland Hills Terminal — part of a multi-terminal, ~3-generation family-owned western-PA school-bus contractor serving Pittsburgh Public Schools. Strong tuck-in candidate for Summit's PA cluster on succession-driven thesis; the 12-employee figure reflects only the Swissvale terminal, with the parent company materially larger across Export/Latrobe/Pittsburgh.
